title: In Pakistan Talks, Iran Saw a U.S. Trying to Dictate, Not Negotiate
summary_full: Iran sees American demands as reaching far beyond what the United States achieved in war. Tehran is gambling that it can withstand further bombardment more than Washington is willing to sustain economic chaos, experts say.
